childhood.familyBackground: Born into a poor rural family in a mountainous village of Hunan Province. No business connections or family wealth. Entirely self-made from rural poverty.
childhood.familyBackgroundKo: 후난성 산간 마을의 빈농 가정 출생. 사업 인맥이나 가문 재산 없음. 완전한 자수성가.
childhood.education: Graduated from Central South University (then Central South University of Technology) in 1983 with a degree in metal materials engineering.
childhood.earlyLife: Born in 1956 in rural Hunan. After university, worked at a state-owned factory. Left to start his own business in the mid-1980s — his first three ventures (sheep trading, glass fiber, wine) all failed. In 1986, finally succeeded selling bronze welding fluxes, earning his first profit of 8,000 yuan with partners.
childhood.earlyLifeKo: 1956년 후난성 농촌 출생. 대학 졸업 후 국영 공장 근무. 1980년대 중반 퇴사 후 창업 — 첫 3개 사업(양 거래·유리섬유·와인) 모두 실패. 1986년 청동 용접 플럭스 판매로 첫 이익 8,000위안 달성.

careerTimeline.event: Founded Lianyuan Welding Material Ltd with three partners — Sany Group's predecessor
careerTimeline.eventKo: 3명의 파트너와 롄위안 용접재료 유한공사 설립 — 삼일(三一)그룹의 전신

careerTimeline.event: Renamed company to Sany Group; pivoted to construction machinery manufacturing
careerTimeline.eventKo: 회사명을 삼일그룹(三一集团)으로 변경; 건설기계 제조로 사업 전환

careerTimeline.event: Sany Heavy Industry listed on Shanghai Stock Exchange; became China's largest concrete machinery maker
careerTimeline.eventKo: 삼일중공업 상하이증권거래소 상장; 중국 최대 콘크리트 기계 제조사

careerTimeline.event: Named China's richest person by Forbes and Hurun Rich List with ~$8 billion net worth
careerTimeline.eventKo: Forbes·후룬 부자 리스트에서 약 $80억 순자산으로 중국 최고 부자 선정

careerTimeline.event: Sany acquired German concrete pump maker Putzmeister for €360 million — major international expansion
careerTimeline.eventKo: 삼일, 독일 콘크리트 펌프 제조사 푸츠마이스터를 €3.6억에 인수 — 대형 해외 확장

careerTimeline.event: Retired as chairman of Sany Group at age 67; Sany ranked world's No.1 in concrete machinery globally
careerTimeline.eventKo: 67세에 삼일그룹 회장 은퇴; 삼일 콘크리트 기계 세계 1위

failures.description: First three business ventures all failed — sheep trading, glass fiber manufacturing, and wine production all collapsed before finding success in welding materials
failures.descriptionKo: 첫 3개 사업(양 거래·유리섬유·와인) 모두 실패 — 용접 재료에서 성공하기 전 연속 좌절
failures.lesson: Persistence through serial failure is essential for entrepreneurs; Liang's fourth attempt finally succeeded and became the seed of a global construction machinery empire
failures.lessonKo: 연속 실패를 관통하는 끈기가 기업가에게 필수; 량원근의 4번째 시도가 마침내 성공해 글로벌 건설기계 제국의 씨앗이 됨

failures.description: China's construction downturn caused Sany's revenue to drop 30%+; overcapacity in Chinese construction machinery industry led to price wars
failures.descriptionKo: 중국 건설 경기 침체로 삼일 매출 30%+ 하락; 중국 건설기계 과잉생산으로 가격전쟁
failures.lesson: Diversification into mining equipment, wind energy, and international markets helped Sany survive China's domestic downcycle
failures.lessonKo: 광산장비·풍력에너지·해외시장 다각화가 삼일의 중국 내수 침체 극복을 도움

personalTraits.knownFor: Founded Sany Group from a small welding materials shop into the world's #1 concrete machinery maker. China's richest person in 2011. Known for persistence (failed 3 businesses before succeeding), aggressive international expansion (Putzmeister acquisition), and transitioning from state factory worker to billionaire entrepreneur.
personalTraits.knownForKo: 소규모 용접재료 가게에서 세계 1위 콘크리트 기계 제조사 삼일그룹 창업. 2011년 중국 최고 부자. 연속 3회 사업 실패 후 성공한 끈기, 공격적 해외 확장(푸츠마이스터 인수), 국영 공장 노동자에서 억만장자 기업가로의 전환으로 유명.
personalTraits.philanthropy: Donated to education and poverty alleviation in Hunan province. Sany Foundation supports rural development and disaster relief in China.
personalTraits.philanthropyKo: 후난성 교육·빈곤 퇴치 기부. 삼일재단 중국 농촌 발전·재해 구호 지원.
personalTraits.controversies: Political connections with Chinese Communist Party — served as delegate to National People's Congress. Sany's US wind farm investment was blocked by President Obama in 2012 on national security grounds. Environmental concerns over construction equipment emissions.
personalTraits.controversiesKo: 중국 공산당 정치 연결 — 전국인민대표대회 대의원. 삼일의 미국 풍력발전 투자가 2012년 오바마 대통령에 의해 국가안보 사유로 차단. 건설장비 배출가스 환경 우려.
